# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:country_legislature_name = {
	type = country
	text = {
		trigger = {
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_technocracy
		}
		localization_key = legislature_board_of_directors
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:russian
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
		}
		localization_key = legislature_congress_of_soviets
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
			country_has_primary_culture = cu:russian
			}
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_council_republic
		}
		localization_key = legislature_congress_of_councils
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:USA ?= this
				AND = {
					OR = {
						is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_south_america
						is_in_geographic_region = geographic_region_central_america
					}
					OR = {
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
						has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
					}
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_congress
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			AND = {
				c:RUS ?= this
				OR = {
					RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
					has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_duma
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			c:AUS ?= this
			country_has_voting_franchise = no
		}
		localization_key = legislature_reichsrat
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			c:AUS ?= this
			country_has_voting_franchise = yes
		}
		localization_key = legislature_diet
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			c:SWI ?= this
		}
		localization_key = legislature_federal_diet
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:SWE ?= this
				AND = {
					c:SCA ?= this
					was_formed_from = SWE
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_riksdag
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:NOR ?= this
				AND = {
					c:SCA ?= this
					was_formed_from = NOR
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_storting
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:DEN ?= this
				AND = {
					c:SCA ?= this
					was_formed_from = DEN
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_folketing
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:ICL ?= this
				AND = {
					c:SCA ?= this
					was_formed_from = ICL
				}
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_althing
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:PRU ?= this
				c:BAV ?= this
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_landtag
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			AND = {
				c:CHI ?= this
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				country_has_voting_franchise = no
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_grand_council
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			AND = {
				c:CHI ?= this
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
				country_has_voting_franchise = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_advisory_council
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			OR = {
				c:FRA ?= this
				c:BUL ?= this
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_parliamentary_republic
				has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_presidential_republic
			}
		}
		localization_key = legislature_national_assembly
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			country_has_voting_franchise = yes
		}
		localization_key = legislature_parliament
	}
	text = { # Fallback
		trigger = {
			country_has_voting_franchise = no
		}
		localization_key = legislature_court
	}
}

REPLACE:future_kuk_name = {
	type = country
	text = {
		trigger = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		}
		localization_key = dyn_c_usga
	}
	text = {
		trigger = {
			NOT = {
				RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			}
		}
		localization_key = KUK
	}
}
